title: microlicia baccharoides
intro: Microlicia baccharoides, also known as Baccharis, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Microlicia baccharoides include reducing inflammation, relieving fever, and treating various infections, as well as supporting the immune system and digestive health. Microlicia baccharoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its therapeutic properties.
